name: Chicken Venetian
recipeIngredient: 3 Skinless Boneless Chicken Breast Halves, or Thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the soy sauce, red wine vinegar, vegetable oil, crushed garlic, and oregano.
2. Place the chicken in a shallow baking dish and pour the marinade over it, ensuring all pieces are coated.
3. Cover the dish with foil or plastic wrap.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes.
5. Remove the foil and turn the chicken over.
6. Continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, until cooked through and tender.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
